home.heroDescription: Be part of history. Join thousands of passionate volunteers in creating an unforgettable spiritual experience for millions. Serve, connect, and make a lasting difference at the world's largest gathering.
home.kumbhDescription: The Kumbh Mela is a transcendent celebration where millions of pilgrims, saints, and seekers converge to take a sacred dip in the holy Godavari River. It is the world's largest peaceful gathering—a spiritual experience that transcends boundaries and unites humanity.
home.every12YearsDesc: Held on the sacred banks of the Godavari River in Nashik, representing centuries of unbroken devotion, culture, and spiritual unity.
home.infiniteImpactDesc: Millions of visitors, countless traditions, and a transformative spiritual journey that shapes lives and preserves ancient wisdom.
home.whyVolunteersMatterDesc: Volunteers are the backbone of this magnificent event. From crowd management and sanitation to medical support, security, and logistics—your service directly impacts millions and ensures this sacred celebration remains safe, organized, and spiritually fulfilling.
home.sevaQuote: "Seva (selfless service) is the highest form of worship."
home.joinMissionDesc: Join us in this extraordinary mission. Become a volunteer and be part of an incredible spiritual and cultural legacy that will resonate for generations to come.

features.title: Why Volunteer with Us?
features.description: Make a meaningful impact in people's lives while being part of a historic spiritual gathering
features.card1Desc: Connect with spirituality and thousands of pilgrims from around the world
features.card2Desc: Be part of a mission to provide essential services to millions of visitors
features.card3Desc: Meet passionate individuals and build lasting connections
features.card4Desc: Enhance your abilities through hands-on experience in a dynamic environment

volunteer.consent: I confirm that all information provided above is true, accurate, and complete to the best of my knowledge.

aboutUs.title: Information & Guidelines
aboutUs.subtitle: Everything you need to know about serving at the Kumbh Mela
aboutUs.sevaDescription: Volunteering at the Kumbh Mela is more than just a duty. It is an act of spiritual service and compassion. As a volunteer, you become a vital part of ensuring that every visitor has a memorable, safe, and spiritually enriching experience. Together, we ensure their safety, comfort, and spiritual experience is seamless.
aboutUs.sevaQuote: Volunteers are the backbone of the spiritual events, bridging the gap between the administration and the devotees.
aboutUs.crowdMgmtDesc: Direct visitors, prevent overcrowding at ghats and temples, and ensure orderly queues during peak times.
aboutUs.infoGuideDesc: Assist visitors with directions, schedules, and arrange handicap assistance to ensure comfortable navigation.
aboutUs.medicalDesc: First responder support and coordinating with ambulances to ensure medical emergencies are handled efficiently.
aboutUs.sanitationDesc: Ensuring the holy grounds remain clean and public facilities are hygienic throughout the event.
aboutUs.faq2A: Volunteers must be at least 18 years of age. Special youth batches (17+) are available with parental consent.
aboutUs.faq4A: Comprehensive safety training is provided before your shift. Medical teams, first aid stations, and 24/7 support are available. All volunteers receive health insurance coverage during their service.
aboutUs.faq5Q: Can I volunteer for multiple days?
aboutUs.faq5A: Absolutely! You can volunteer for as many days as your schedule allows. Shifts can be customized from 4 hours to full-day commitments.
aboutUs.joinForceDesc: Applications are closing soon. Secure your spot and volunteer today!
aboutUs.tip2: Wear comfortable shoes and light clothing
aboutUs.readyDesc: Join thousands of volunteers in serving at the Kumbh Mela 2027
